description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and an open-plan layout with large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for abundant natural light. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden paneling, complemented by white trim and structural elements. A spacious deck area includes a swimming pool, hot tub, and outdoor seating, seamlessly connecting indoor and outdoor living spaces. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including a kitchen, living area, bedrooms, and bathrooms, all visible through the expansive windows. Lush potted plants and minimalist landscaping enhance the contemporary aesthetic. The bungalow is elevated on short stilts, with a staircase leading up to the main entrance.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, wooden paneling, and an expansive deck featuring a pool and hot tub. The design emphasizes open, airy spaces and seamless indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front deck with a pool, hot tub, and outdoor seating, as well as the main entrance and large glass windows.
description_view_1: This angle shows the side elevation, revealing the kitchen area, additional windows, and potted plants on the deck.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back facade with grouped windows, a secondary entrance, and the overall rectangular structure.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the staircase leading to the deck, the hot tub, and the connection between the indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
